title: Rosinante Takes Law Away
description: Pages 6–10 focus on rosinante takes law away, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Kyros, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as rosinante reveals his true nature and chooses to save Law from Doflamingo, even as the Donquixote Family closes in.

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where're those ten- Ryubito!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why don't they bow?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Find 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let's String 'em up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They've escaped! Find them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They should still be somewhere nearby!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't kill them! Keep them alive and make them suffer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Carve the several hundred years of our resentment and hate into their bones!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: father... Why are we being chased?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We can hide here from the elements.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm grateful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The rumors of our existence haven't reached this area yet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: There's no way we can go on living here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Bugs are everywhere in the house! It reeks so bad it makes me wanna puke!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Find them! That family...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I never expected it would come to this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I was naive... I beg you... I'll do anything!

dialogue.speaker: Baby 5
dialogue.text: Just my wife and children... allow them to return to Mariejois!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: At this rate, every last member of my family is going to be killed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: This is the life you have chosen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The discarded cannot be regained.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Do not dare to call upon us again. You filthy human.

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: father... for the first time in my life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: It hurts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: for the first time in my life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I'm hungry!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Eat it quickly, ROCI!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: People are coming!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: WAAAH! WAAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Mother!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Forgive me... My health... it's been...

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: father...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: mother's dead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: We've caught them!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Please, spare my children!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Do whatever you must to me alone! Please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: You bastard! What have you done!?

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Young Master.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: We've caught law!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: It seems he's suddenly dove- hoped the urge to escape!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Anyone mention

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: He ran all the way to harbor- iiiiin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: 'Cause he stabbed Cora- San, he's gonna get tortured dasuyan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: But I feel so bad for him...

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: corazon! shit... so he didn't die!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Now they're just gonna get to kill me for free!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: I thought I'd bribed buffalo with that ice cream...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Remember, depending

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: But that snitch probably went and ratted me out to aniki anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: I'm pretty sure that the blade went right through him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Yet there he is, all calm and shit!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Law... I've called you here for one reason.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: I intend to make you a full-fledged member...

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: of the Donquixote family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: The sort of terrible glare birthed in those that have faced the most horrible of experiences...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: You have potential!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Ohohoho! You've been deemed worthy! Well done! The young master is the kind of person that can predict the future.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Does he...not yet know about Corazon?

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Why!? Corazon would have at least been able to tell him by writing it out, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: WHAT THE HELL'S GOING ON...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: worthy or not...I'm still going to die in three years.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Fufufu! That's all up to your luck!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: My specialty is black market business.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Among other things, I deal in devil fruits, the power of these fruits sometimes exceeds human knowledge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: There may be a power out there than can heal even your illness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Devil fruits...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: If you have Lady Luck on your side...then, among the fruits that will come into my possession within the next 3 years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: There is a possibility that one may be able to save you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: I will train you from here on out as...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: The man who will be my right hand in 10 years time!

summary: Rosinante Takes Law Away advances the Dressrosa story through Kyros, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
